profile.role_zh: 计算机学院大三·独立开发者
profile.innate_zh: 创造力强、不喜欢被约束、自学能力突出
profile.learned_zh: 独立开发多个app的经历让他更相信市场而非学校
profile.learned_en: Shipping multiple apps taught him to trust market more than school
profile.belief_zh: 做出有人用的东西比论文重要
profile.belief_en: Making something people use beats papers
profile.goal_zh: 大学期间实现一个产品月入过万
profile.goal_en: Ship a product netting 10k+ RMB/month before graduation
profile.contradiction_zh: 想退学全职创业 vs 不敢让父母失望
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to drop out and go full-time vs. won't disappoint parents
profile.deep_zh: 其实渴望认同，只是不想从学术体系里获得
profile.deep_en: Actually craves recognition, just not from academia
profile.desire_zh: 靠自己的产品养活自己
profile.desire_en: Supporting himself with his own product
profile.lifestyle_zh: 不规律，但有自己的节奏
profile.rhythm_zh: 灵感来了连续工作8小时，没灵感就到处晃
profile.spaces_zh: 宿舍（主要工作场所）、咖啡厅、创业孵化中心
profile.constraint_zh: 课程还是要应付；服务器费用在上涨
profile.constraint_en: Still must pass courses; server costs rising
profile.bias_zh: 倾向高估自己产品的市场需求
profile.narrative_zh: 课堂教的那些东西，我早就在项目里用过了
profile.narrative_en: What they teach in class, I already shipped
